name: sovereign-warden-investor-pack
description: Sovereign Warden — offline investor and mentor pack
author: Sovereign Warden

scripts.dev: npm run prepare:mentor && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.dist:mentor:mac: npm run build && npm run prepare:mentor && cross-env PACK_PROFILE=mentor electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.mentor.json
scripts.dist:investor:mac: npm run build && npm run prepare:investor && cross-env PACK_PROFILE=investor electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.investor.json
scripts.dist:mentor:win: npm run build && npm run prepare:mentor && cross-env PACK_PROFILE=mentor electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.mentor.json
scripts.dist:investor:win: npm run build && npm run prepare:investor && cross-env PACK_PROFILE=investor electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.investor.json
